coupled_amendment.text: For PVP-005W0 only, coupled deterministic 120 Hz articulated truth supersedes the canon prototype simplification; no split-brain runtime logic is admissible.

findings.summary: Canonical media is incomplete: rendering-overview.png, gameplay-demo.mp4, and manifest.json are absent.

findings.evidence: zero exact-HEAD runs for adversarial-visual-contract.yml and pvp005-visual.yml; latest branch runs 29386952505 and 29386952507 failed at 6d652650be82e082fb0aee01a0a5b5cb10dee2d9
findings.summary: Required visual/adversarial workflows are not green on the evaluated PR head.

findings.evidence: PVP005_ACCEPTANCE_PACKET.json absent; latest motion-readability and provenance-hash jobs failed
findings.summary: Motion admission and revision-bound provenance remain fail-closed.

findings.evidence: permanent thresholds require 2048px individual views and 4096px sheets; current harness/capture use 512px tiles and 2048px sheets; both fresh validators return PASS_CONFIG_ONLY
findings.summary: The config-only validators do not reject the current render-resolution contradiction.

findings.evidence: screen_pvp005_motion_candidates.py emits just-dodge-pvp005-candidate-screen-v2 while build_pvp005_candidate_packet.py accepts only v1
findings.summary: Candidate screen regeneration and packet assembly schemas are incompatible.

findings.evidence: PR review 4700408670 contains two P2 line comments; public REST does not expose thread resolution state
findings.summary: Two automated review findings remain present in the PR baseline and require explicit disposition.

findings.evidence: fresh all-target run: 248 passed, 0 failed, 3 ignored after reusing the existing Python shared library; README says 237 current-tree tests
findings.summary: The README test-count claim is stale relative to the observed exact-HEAD suite.

findings.evidence: both exact-HEAD CI checks succeeded with one actions/checkout@v4 Node.js 20 deprecation warning each
findings.summary: Remote CI is green but carries a runner deprecation annotation.

review_comments_api.body_first_line: **<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Keep the capture resolution aligned with the visual contract**
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Keep packet builder in sync with screener schema**
